lang.desc: Ebiwandiiko by'amateeka, foomu z'obusuubuzi n'engeri z'okusaka bikakasiddwa.
hero.badge: Mukulembeze mu Kufulumya Ebyobugagga Class A • Kampala
hero.title: Ebyobugagga ne Zaabu Ebisaanidde Okufunibwa mu Bulembeze
hero.desc: Enfuga ey'amateeka n'okukebera kwa laboratole ya gavumenti ey'amazima wamu n'ekitongole kya banka eky'obwesige.
seo.home.title: Bafulumya ba Zaabu Abakakasibwa mu Kampala | Mineral Dealers Africa
seo.home.desc: Kikolera munsoma y'amateeka g'ebyobugagga ga Uganda 2022. Zaabu omukakasidwa ku bbeeyi ya LBMA Kampala wamu n'okukebera okw'amateeka.
seo.home.keywords: Abatunda zaabu mu Kampala, amateeka ga zaabu Uganda 2022, LBMA gold standards Kampala, zaabu n'ebiragala Kampala

seo.about.keywords: layisensi ya zaabu Kampala, eby'obufuzi byaffe mu Uganda, mineral dealers
seo.services.title: Okukebera Zaabu n'Okutambuza Ebyobugagga | LBMA Kampala
seo.services.desc: Okukebera amateeka ga gavumenti kuleeta obwesige. Tukola ne banka z'obwesige okulaba nti byonna bitambula mu mateeka.

seo.marketplace.title: Akatale k'Ebyobugagga mu Ouganda | Mineral Dealers Africa
seo.marketplace.desc: Kebera zaabu n'ebika by'ebitundu n'ebirongozo mu katale kaffe eka Kampala. Abakugu bokka abalina ebiwandiiko.
seo.marketplace.keywords: gula zaabu mu Uganda, abatunda zaabu Kampala, ebyobugagga ebyakakasibwa
seo.miners.title: Okuyamba Abalima n'Abasima Ebyobugagga mu Ouganda | Amateeka ga 2022
seo.miners.desc: Okuyamba banna-Uganda abasima zaabu okufuna layisensi n'okukebera amateeka ga gavumenti basobole okutunda ne mu nsi endala.
seo.miners.keywords: abasima zaabu mu Uganda, okutereeza zaabu Kampala, eby'amateeka ge ggwanga
seo.education.title: Manya Amateeka g'Ebyobugagga mu Uganda | UG Mining Act 2022
seo.education.desc: Soma ku kufulumya zaabu, ebisale, n'amateeka agafuga obusuubuzi bwa zaabu mu kampuni ya Mineral Dealers.
seo.education.keywords: amateeka g'ebyobugagga Uganda, kukebera ebisale bya zaabu Kampala
seo.investor.title: Abagagga n'Amakubo Amakakasibwa mu Kampala | LBMA standards
seo.investor.desc: Engeri gy'oyinza okutunda emmaali yo n'okukuuma ettaka lyo amakumi mu ngeri esaanidde ku bigera ku LBMA.
seo.investor.keywords: okutunda eby'obugagga mu Afrika, bbeeyi ya zaabu eya Kampala

seo.blog.desc: Endegeza ya bbeeyi ya zaabu ne zaabu mu Kampala wamu n'ebikyuse mu mateeka g'ebyobugagga ga Uganda ga 2022.
seo.blog.keywords: ebya zaabu Uganda bbeeyi, ebitongole by'ebyobugagga

seo.contact.keywords: ofisi za mineral dealers Kampala, essimu ya zaabu Kampala
home.slider.title0: Okukolagana n'Abasima zaabu ku ttaka okutereevu
home.slider.desc0: Tukola n'ebyongerezo by'abantu ku ttaka ebyemanyi basobole okufuna zaabu ow'amazima mu ngeri ey'amateeka ga OECD.
home.slider.desc1: Alina gumu ku mikutu egikeberebwa laboratole ya gavumenti eya DGSM mu kisenge kya Entebbe dda.
home.slider.desc2: Ofisi efuna kuttule Class A ey'okutunda, wamu n'okusasula ebisale bya gavumenti mu butereevu ne tusika emmaali e Entebbe.
home.refinery.title: Ofisi Enkulu Ensaanuusi ya Zaabu mu Kampala
home.refinery.desc: Enkola ey'obwesige ey'obutereevu okuva mu mikutu gyaffe gya gavumenti okutuuka e Entebbe kisaawe kya nnyonyi.
home.metrics.title: Okukakasa Abagula Ebyobugagga mu Nsi Zonna
home.metrics.desc: Ebyobusuubuzi bulyaza amawanga gyafumbiddwa ebizibu. Kampuni ya Mineral Dealers Africa yeegoba obubbi bwonna n'ekola ne gavumenti.
home.metrics.bullet1: Okukwatagana ne laboratole ya gavumenti e Entebbe okulaba nti upimaji gukolebwa mbeera ntuufu.
home.metrics.bullet2: Okukebera abasima zaabu abato (ASM) basobole okukuuma obulungi bw'abakozi munsi eno.
home.metrics.bullet3: Okumaliriza emisolo gyonna, obuwandiike bwa custom, foomu z'obusuubuzi zimaliriziddwa.
home.metrics.bullet4: Kukwasa emmaali ne motoka z'obwesige eza banka okutuuka ddala ku nnyonyi.
home.features.audit.title: Okukebera Abatunda
home.features.audit.desc: Emirimu n'ebifo byonna kikeberebwa bulungi. Tukantola nti layisensi z'obutereevu ne kampuni ziri mu bitongole emanyi.
home.features.assay.title: Kukebera Spectrograph
home.features.assay.desc: Kukebera laboratole ya DGSM kwekukakasa karat n'obuzito obw'amazima n'obwesige obujjuvu.
home.features.logistics.title: Kukuuma n'Okutambuza Emmaali
home.features.logistics.desc: Tukola n'ekitongole kya Brinks ne G4S okukuuma emmaali okuva mu dula lyaffe okutuuka ku nnyonyi.
home.features.escrow.title: Akaunti za Escrow
home.features.escrow.desc: Endagaano zonna ez'obusuubuzi zikolebwa n'akaunti nsaanuuse za banka okukuuma ssente zo zote.
home.testimonials.title: Abaguzi baffe mu nsi yonna b'abagamba
home.testimonials.quote1: Okugula almasi mu Central Africa kusinga okwagala okukuuma amagezi ag'obwegendereza. Kampuni ya Mineral Dealers Africa eyambyeko ku bitundu byonna n'okutukuza amateeka ga Kimberley mu Angola.
home.testimonials.quote2: Okutambula mu mateeka g'ebyobugagga amaggya ag'omwaka 2022 kusinga obulyake obw'olumu. Ndiga eyali ku mulimu mu Kampala yakolagana bulungi n'ekitongole gavumenti.
home.testimonials.quote3: Okugula zaabu mu Afrika kubeera kw'obwesige bokka bwekukeberwa mu laboratole ya gavumenti. Kampuni eno yantangira kukebera kw'ekisenge e Entebbe ne tufuna custom biwandiiko bulungi.
home.faqs.title: Ebibuzo Ebikyusa ku Zaabu ne Gavumenti mu Uganda
about.title: Ofisi Yaffe y'Ey'obwesige ku Sourcing ya Zaabu N'ebyobugagga mu Afrika
about.narrative1: Twasimbibwa ku mazima, okukuuma amateeka, okutereeza ofisi zaffe, n'okukolera ku mateeka g'Ebyobugagga ag'omulembe gwa Uganda Mining Act 2022. MDA eyamba okuyunga abaguzi b'ensi yonna n'abasima abasangi.
about.narrative2: Tukola n'ebyongerezo by'abasima zaabu (ASM) abalina layisensi mu Uganda, Tanzania, ne Congo. Tuggyewo ababbi b'omu mikutu n'ebikukutu ne tuteekawo enkola eya banka n'obutereevu n'ekitongole kya DGSM Entebbe.
about.mission.title: Ebigendererwa Byaffe
about.mission.desc: Okutukuza obusuubuzi bw'ebyobugagga ku mutindo ogw'amazima n'okutangaaza kukebera kwa gavumenti buli muntu afune zaabu ow'amazima.
about.pipeline.title: Enkola ey'Obwesige ey'emmaali
about.pipeline.desc: Okukolera ku miongozo gya OECD okulaba nti mmaali teva mu nnyonyi z'olutalo n'okuyamba banna-Uganda mu nkulaakulana.
about.credentials.title: Hati ne Layisensi za Kampuni
about.credentials.footer: Abakulu mu bodi balina layisensi z'obutongole era bakolera wamu n'ekitongole ky'emisolo gya custom.
services.title: Okusaka, Amateeka ne Gavumenti ku Byobugagga
services.desc: Kampuni ya Mineral Dealers Africa ekuwa obuyambi bwonna mu Kampala wamu n'abasaza n'abakebezi b'amazima kunkomera yonna okulinda emmaali yo.
services.gold.title: Zaabu n'Okusaka kwe Ggwanga
services.gold.short: Zaabu ow'ebiragala, pépites ne matofali ku bbeeyi LBMA enkakasibwa.
services.gold.detail: Tusaka zaabu butereevu okuva mu basima abato abalina layisensi ku ttaka. Tukola okuva mu kukebera emisolo gyonna okutuuka ku mikutu gy'obwesige.
services.gem.title: Emmaali y'Amayinja ag'Omuwendo
services.gem.short: Almasi safi, tanzanite, emeralds, ne sapphires eby'amazima.
services.gem.detail: Tukutwala ku bitundu bwasimbiddwa amayinja ag'omuwendo (ex. emeralds mu Lufwanyama, tanzanite block D). Almasi zaffe zonna zirina Kimberley Process certificates.
services.gem.benefit: Emmaali eva mu dula litaliimu ntalo zanna gwanga.
services.vet.title: Okukebera Abatunda
services.vet.detail: Kulinda ensimbi zo mumpitiriza ya laboratole yaffe. Tunaamanya kiki suppliers kiky'alina and obutereevu bwa ofisi ne concessions.
services.broker.title: Courtage Empya ey'Obwesige
services.broker.short: Okuteeka emikono gya custom contract n'ebitongole.
services.broker.detail: Emikutu gy'amateeka gye migasigiddwa kulinda okutunuulira FOB ne CIF endagaano za foomu mu bulungi.
services.broker.benefit: Kulinda ssente n'akaunti nsaanuuse za banka.
services.due.title: Ripoti za Diligence n'amazima
services.due.short: Tathmini ya OECD Annex II ne Mining Act Uganda.
services.due.detail: Kukebera ebifa ku suppliers ne concession profiles okulinda emisolo mibi, anti-graft, n'ebisale by'ebikukutu.
services.due.benefit: Kuleeta safety eri abatunda ebyobugagga mu nsi endala.
services.export.title: Obuyambi ku Kisaawe k'ennyonyi ne Custom
services.export.short: Kusitula misolo ne custom foomu ku kisaawe kya gavumenti Entebbe.
services.export.detail: Kukolerako mu ofisi ya DGSM ofisi ya custom ku nnyonyi Entebbe (EBB) tukole layisensi, certificates, n'ebibaddewo.
services.export.benefit: Kwanguyiza mmaali okuva mu forodha buli muntu afune obuyambi.
services.consult.title: Ushauri wa Concessions ne Mashini
services.consult.short: Obuyambi ku kusaba ofisi n'okugula mashini z'okulemesa ettaka.
services.consult.detail: Kuyamba consortium za banna-gwanga mu bulembeze basobole okuyingiza mashini, amateeka g'ettaka kusaako n'emisolo egisabibwa.
services.consult.benefit: Kutambula ne Uganda Mining Act 2022 amateeka g'amazima.
services.advis.title: Ushauri wa Nsimbi n'Abagagga
services.advis.short: Okulinda mtaji gw'abagagga and Family Offices mu nkola za Uganda.
services.advis.detail: Kuwa ripoti ey'obunonnyerezi ku bbeeyi ne mikutu gy'emisolo bwe kikyuse munsonga z'ebyobugagga zaffe.
services.advis.benefit: Kulinda nsimbi za banna gwanga ku bisale ebikyuse na politiki.
services.refine.title: Kusaanuusa Zaabu mu Kampala
services.refine.short: Kusaanuusa zaabu ow'empitiriza okutuuka ku 24K pure gold bricks.
services.refine.detail: Simamia kusaanuusa zaabu mumpitiriza y'ekkolero lya gavumenti eryakakasibwa, tukebere nti Karat eri mu bitongole gye gavumenti egumya.
services.refine.benefit: Kufulumya zaabu asaanira omuwendo gw'ensi yonna.
services.assay.title: Lekatano n'Okukebera Pure Gold Spectrograph
services.assay.short: Upimaji wa laboratole ya DGSM mu Entebbe.
services.assay.detail: Okukwasaganya enkola ey'amazima n'ekisenge kyomuwendo gwa DGSM e Entebbe, kukebera karat n'obutereevu obwa chemical assay.
services.assay.benefit: Tangaaza asilimia ya zaabu obutaliimu fraud.
services.logis.title: Kutambuza Emmaali ne Motoka za Benki G4S
services.logis.detail: Kutambuza n'obukuumi emmaali okuva mu dula lyafe Kampala okutuuka ku nnyonyi n'engalo z'abanene kisaako ne insurance kumi bulungi.
services.logis.benefit: Emmaali yo ebeera mumpitiriza erimu ulinzi wa banka zonna.
services.intel.title: Ripoti za Bbeeyi n'amawulire g'ebyobugagga
services.intel.short: Tathmini ya bbeeyi y'ebitenga mu migodi gy'ebitundu.
services.intel.detail: Omuwendo ne ripoti za kila wiki kwongereza bbeeyi n'amateeka ya gavumenti kuleeta prediction ey'enjawulo mu bussuubusi.
services.intel.benefit: Kikuyamba okugula mmaali kubbeeyi eri mu kintu ekyatereeza.
miners.title: Kuyamba Abasima Zaabu mu Afrika Okutuuka ku Nsimbi z'Ensi Zonna
miners.desc: Muli kibiina ky'abasima zaabu (ASM) oba mukolera ku layisensi mu Ouganda ne Tanzania ? Tubayunga butereevu ku makolero g'ensi yonna n'amakumi agasabibwa mu Mining Act 2022.
miners.sidebar.title: Faida z'Okukolagana nafe
miners.step1.title: Kujisajili we Ofisi
miners.step1.desc: Weereza obubaka obufa ku kampuni yafe, layisensi and concessions mumpitiriza ya foomu yafe digital emanyi.
miners.step2.title: Tathmini n'Okukebera Sampuli
miners.step2.desc: Abakebezi baffe bajja kujja ku mine kuddula lyammwe bakebere, batereeze samples batwale mu lab ya DGSM.
miners.step3.title: Teeka Emmaali mu Katale
miners.step3.desc: Wandiika uzito owakakasibwa n'ebirongozo mu katale kaffe digital tuluseeko abatunda n'abagula.
miners.step4.title: Okukwasa Emmaali n'Okusasulwa
miners.step4.desc: Abaguzi bwe batoola ensimbi mu escrow ya benki, motoka dda za G4S zijja kusindika zaabu e Entebbe.
miners.privilege1.title: Akatale k'Ensi Yonna
miners.privilege1.desc: Okukwatagana n'abagula abamanyi n'ebitongole ebyobwesige mu nsi yonna.
miners.privilege2.title: Kutunda Butereevu
miners.privilege2.desc: Kwegoba ababbi n'akaunti ezisaba ssente z'obwereere, kuleeta asilimia kumi mu bulungieri gy'abasima.
miners.privilege3.title: Misaada y'Amateeka ne Custom
miners.privilege3.desc: Urahisishaji wa forodha ne kukebera gavumenti permits kisaako n'okusasula emisolo gyonna.
education.tag: ACADEMY YA MIONGOZO GYA GAVUMENTI NE LAZIMA
education.title: Kituo muly'Abaguzi b'Emmaali Ensaanuuse
education.desc: Elimu lisinga kulinda emmaali mu bussuubuzi bwa precious metals. Tutangaaza amateeka omulembe, customs, n'engeri y'okutangira bulyake.
education.alert.title: Tahadhari ey'Ababbi n'okulimbibwa
education.alert.desc: Omuntu asiyetambuliwa bwakusingira zaabu ow'asika asilimia kumi okuggya ku bbeeyi y'ensi, kubira Kampala essaawa eno. MDA ekola independently audit.
education.additional.sec0.title: Lekatano n'Emisolo ku Kufulumya Zaabu
education.additional.sec0.desc: Kikolera ku mateeka g' Ouganda 2022, zaabu ow'ebiragala talina kusindikibwa nsi endala nga takoleddwako kusaanuusa. Zaabu pure (99.5%+) asaba kodi ya 5% kisheria.
education.additional.sec1.title: Manya Karat n'Obulungi bwa Zaabu
education.additional.sec1.desc: Zaabu asimibwa mu mikutu gyaffe aba alluvial (95% pure). Okutuuka ku karat 24K pure gold bricks lazima afune kusaanuusa mu refinery ekakasibwa.
education.additional.sec2.title: Hati n'Ebiwandiiko bya Custom
education.additional.sec2.desc: Emmaali yonna asaba: 1) Mineral Dealer License, 2) DGSM Export Permit, 3) Customs biwandiiko, 4) Certificate of Origin Uganda, 5) Assay report.
investor.tag: SOVEREIGN COMMISSION EYA BAGAGGA NE MTAJI
investor.title: Kituo ky'Abagagga b'Emmaali Ensi Yonna
investor.desc: Ouganda erimu ebyobugagga bingi nnyo ebisaanira okutundibwa. Tubatereereza enkola ey'obwesige n'akaunti amakumi za benki escrow buli muntu emmaali ye mugumye kumi.
investor.tier0.title: Okugula Physically Zaabu Ow'Amazima
investor.tier0.subtitle: Ununuzi ow'Obutereevu
investor.tier0.desc: Kugula dhahabu ghafi oba nuggets mubukalamu, kusaanuusa mu Kampala basobole okufuna karat 24K bricks n'okutambuliza mu Custom ne custom permits.
investor.tier0.potential: Mali y'Obwesige erimu Liquidity nnene kumi
investor.tier1.title: Mitambo n'Ensindika ya Concessions
investor.tier1.subtitle: Ushirika bwa Joint-Ventures
investor.tier1.desc: Okugula mashini nnyonnyolezi (ex. machinery, excavators) ku concessions zafe tukole mikutu egy'obutereevu n'okuweesa samples kubbeeyi entono.
investor.tier1.potential: Ongezeko ddene lya Emmaali ya Zaabu
investor.tier1.risk: Kati (Lazima afune akaunti za escrow banka)
investor.protocol.title: Sera ya Risk Management
investor.protocol.desc: Emmaali yaffe yote etambulira mu escrow trusts za bbenki. Tewali kusasula kugeula kabiri laboratole enkulusibwa DGSM esinya kupima.
investor.pillars.title: Pillars z'Okukebera n'Obukuumi
investor.pillars.step1.title: Kusajili Kampuni ey'Amateeka & KYC
investor.pillars.step1.desc: Abaguzi wansizonna basajilibwa mukitonge ebyobugagga DGSM Kampala, ne tuteekawo bank channels kuzuisa kodi mibi n'ensimbi chafu.
investor.pillars.step2.title: Sampling n'Okukebera Sampuli
investor.pillars.step2.desc: Zaabu owakakasibwa akusanyisiddwa mu ofisi ya Kampala laboratole ya gavumenti ebere kukebera chemcial assay mumaaso ga maofisa.
investor.pillars.step3.title: Mihuri ne Custom mu Entebbe Airport (EBB)
investor.pillars.step3.desc: Okusasula emisolo kumi egya 5% royal tax, custom seals ku mifuko kisaako n'okusindikiza ne drola lya Brinks.
blog.tag: AMAWILE NE TIKINA BY'OBUSUUBUSI mu AFRICA
blog.title: Mjournal ya Mineral Sourcing mu Ouganda
blog.desc: Abakugu mu by'amateeka ne geology banyiga kila wiki ripoti z'okusasula ebisale Kampala, bbeeyi, na Uganda Mining Act updates.
blog.disclaimer: Mjournals muna ziri fiki eya miongozo gya kukebera amateeka bokka. Sio business advisory ya kifedha.
contact.tag: KITONGE KY'OBWESIGE NE GAVUMENTI EKUSAANUUSI mu KAMPALA
contact.title: Wasiliana ne Ofisi enkulu ey'Amateeka ne Kusaanuusa mu Kampala
contact.desc: Tukubire mangu oba weereza obubaka tukwatagane ku nsonga z'ebyobugagga ne custom permits.
contact.form.title: Wandiika Maelezo ga Emmaali y'Okwagala Sourcing physically
contact.form.name: Amanya Gali ku Pasipoti
contact.success.title: Obubaka Bo Weereza Bupokerebwaddala
contact.success.desc: Ofisi ya kisheria ya MDA egenda kebera bulungi ebiwandiiko byo egabaneko ububaka mangu essaawa kumi n'ebiri.
contact.office.tag: MDA CODES Z'ENSI ZOOM mu KAMPALA
contact.office.title: Ofisi Zaffe Enkulu Ouganda
contact.office.addressVal: Plot 429, Lubowa Estate, Sseguku, Entebbe Road, Kampala, Uganda
contact.safety.title: Sera ya Kushuhudia Mikutano mu Ofisi
contact.safety.desc: Kikolera ku mateeka g'ebyobugagga mu Uganda n'okusika banna-graft, temuli walked-ins bila kusiina miadi kumi na nnya masaa mumaaso. Muna mikutano lazima mufune Pasipoti ku ofisi.
